title: OptiNa Reborn RP
description: an extension for OptiNa Reborn Modpack.
body:
### ⚠️ Please Note:- This Pack is Exclusively made for [OptiNa Reborn](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optina-reborn) Modpack. if you want to download this Resource pack, download the Modpack instead!
![front cover](https://github.com/OptiNa-Team/OptiNa-Reborn-RP/blob/assets/media/homepage.png?raw=true) # 🔥 About This serves as a straightforward dependency for the [OptiNa Reborn](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optina-reborn) Modpack. I will separate it to reduce the overall size of the `.mrpack` file. ## 🤔 What is use of this pack? this pack contains OptiNa Reborn Modpack material, some more features coming in future,
btw here is list👇 1. Logo (Main Menu) 2. Custom Splashes 3. Icons 4. Mods usage guide 5. Some modpack assets ## 🤨 Why this is an Different Resource Pack instead in local modpack ? To maintain a clean and organized Modpack, I will separate this component. This action will help reduce the overall size of the `.mrpack` file, benefiting the Modrinth Server by minimizing resource usage, this will improve download speed as well ## ⚡ This will help to Update Modpack Since this Resource Pack is open-source, allowing contributions from anyone, managing a large changelog can be challenging. To simplify updates, I will create a separate pack. This approach will make it easier to handle changes, especially during major Minecraft updates. [Source Code Available at Github](https://github.com/OptiNa-Team/OptiNa-Reborn-RP/) ## 🥸 License This Resource Pack has same License as OptiNa Reborn Modpack. [GNU Public License v3](https://github.com/OptiNa-Team/OptiNa-Reborn-RP/blob/1.20.x/LICENSE.md) **Note:- OptiNa Reborn. Modpack Source Code Contains Licence File/`LICENCE.md`** ## 📖 Compatibility - compatible with Minecraft latest Release `1.21.x` - obviously [OptiNa Reborn](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optina-reborn) Modpack is recommended - Game Edition `Java` ## 👁️‍🗨️ Why would a user want to download it? Instead of downloading this resource pack separately, I recommend getting the [OptiNa Reborn](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optina-reborn) Modpack, which is already includes it.
hope you enjoy this extension! ♥️
